headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 2, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5, with Geraldo Perdomo leading the Diamondbacks with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save. The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Matt Brash has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. Ryan Helsley, Brandon Woodruff, Kyle Backhus, Luis Robert Jr., Brandon Williamson, Javier Báez, and Casey Mize have also been placed on the injured list due to various injuries.

The Detroit Tigers have made a move in the 2026 season, acquiring infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, and the Toronto Blue Jays acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5, securing a narrow victory. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rangers Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Tyler Alexander earning the win and Jacob Latz notching the save.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Pirates in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 9-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with the Pirates' Mitch Keller earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Nationals 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief. William Contreras led the Brewers' offense with 4 hits and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Matt Brash Placed on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners right-handed pitcher Matt Brash has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. Short joins the Tigers' roster as the team continues to make moves in the 2026 season.
